text:
is an official art book for the Attack on Titan manga, including illustrations by the manga's author Hajime Isayama and colors by Nakao Yukari.

Contents

The art book contains the following:
Full color illustrations
Black and white illustrations before coloring
Bonus illustrations drawn in the past during events
Interview with Hajime Isayama
Double interview with Hajime Isayama and Nakao Yukari

Bundled together with the art book come four extras:
The Attack on Titan Volume 35 booklet
A "super-precise reproduction" of the final chapter of the series
Mikasa's scarf
Eren's key and lock
